verse_text: 'Therefore I say to you, every sin and blasphemy will be forgiven men, but the blasphemy against the Spirit will not be forgiven men.

links.context: What about those Christians who are not living righteously? Sin leading to death is willful, continual disbelief in the grace of the Holy Spirit toward us. (See [[MAT.12:28]], [[MAT.12:31]], 32; [[HEB.6:4]]-6; 10:26-31.)

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden

links.context: The Lord Jesus Christ elaborated on this thought ([[MAT.12:31]]-37).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
